core_mechanics: Twin-stick arcade shooter with 6 game modes. Primary verbs: move (left stick), shoot (right stick), detonate bomb (clear screen, limited). Core loop: destroy geometric enemies, collect green geoms (multiplier pickups) to increase score multiplier (up to x150), maintain multiplier by continuous kills without dying. Win condition varies by mode (survival time, point threshold, wave completion). Lose: ship collides with enemy or gets caught in geometry. Physics: momentum-based inertial movement with smooth acceleration/deceleration, no friction on open grid. Enemies spawn from grid perimeter, move in pattern-specific behaviors. Camera: fixed overhead view of arena grid, slight zoom based on enemy density in some modes. Grid warps and deforms based on movement and explosions creating dynamic spatial awareness challenges.
controls: Left analog stick: 360-degree movement with analog precision. Right analog stick: 360-degree shooting direction, auto-fire when stick held in any direction. Bombs: face button (limited quantity, refills at score thresholds). No jump, no melee. Movement has ~100ms acceleration curve from stop to max speed. No coyote time (not a platformer). No animation cancels - shooting is instant directional. Shooting does not affect movement speed. Bombs have ~500ms detonation animation with expanding circular shockwave, grants brief invincibility during animation.

characters.protagonist: Small neon claw/arrowhead ship. No upgrade paths - abilities are fixed. Single weapon: continuous stream of white/cyan energy bullets in aimed direction. 3 bombs per life, earn +1 bomb at score milestones (25k, 100k, etc). No special abilities, no alt-fire, no power-ups. Core strength is maneuverability and precision aiming. Ship has small hitbox (approx 3x5 pixels in classic mode) critical for dodging dense bullet patterns.
characters.visual_description: Bright cyan/white geometric claw shape, appears as small arrowhead or angular ship ~8-12 pixels. Sharp angular design with subtle glow/bloom effect. Leaves short particle trail when moving. Death explosion creates white starburst particle effect. Visual style: vector-like neon wireframe aesthetic with intense bloom lighting.

visual_style: Retro vector arcade aesthetic with modern particle effects and HDR bloom. Black grid background with bright neon wireframe enemies and effects. Color palette: intense cyan, electric blue, hot pink/magenta, yellow, orange, green (for geoms), white (player bullets). Enemies color-coded by type: pink squares, blue diamonds, green snakes, orange pinwheels. Heavy bloom/glow post-processing creates light bleed effect. Particle explosions in matching enemy colors. Grid deformation creates visual rhythm. Character proportions: minimalist geometric shapes, player ship ~10-15 pixels, enemies range 8-40 pixels. Effect style: thousands of particles, additive blending, trailing motion blur on fast objects, screen-shake on bomb detonation.
audio: Electronic/synthwave soundtrack with pulsing basslines and driving beats. Music dynamically layers intensity based on multiplier level - more instrumentation at higher multipliers. Key SFX: shooting (continuous electronic buzz), enemy destruction (pitched synth pops varying by enemy type), geom collection (ascending chime), multiplier increase (rising electronic tone), bomb detonation (deep bass whoosh + white noise burst), death (discordant crash + silence), respawn (ascending build tone). Ambient: subtle grid hum, enemy movement whooshes for large formations. Dynamic audio: music mutes briefly on death, SFX pitch increases with multiplier tier, enemy spawn warnings (subtle audio cue before wave).

enemies.name: Pink Dart
enemies.attack_pattern: Relentlessly pursues player at moderate speed, adjusts trajectory continuously
enemies.weakness: Low health, easily destroyed but dangerous in swarms
enemies.visual_description: Small pink diamond shape with trailing particles, pulsing glow

enemies.name: Blue Diamond
enemies.attack_pattern: Bounces off arena walls in straight lines, reflects at angles like a pinball
enemies.weakness: Predictable trajectory once direction is established
enemies.visual_description: Blue diamond-shaped enemy with crystalline edges, leaves light trails

enemies.name: Green Snake
enemies.attack_pattern: Serpentine movement following player, body segments trail behind head
enemies.weakness: Must destroy head first, body segments collapse afterward
enemies.visual_description: Segmented snake with glowing green head and connected body parts, undulates smoothly

enemies.name: Orange Weaver
enemies.attack_pattern: Moves in geometric patterns across screen, weaves between other enemies
enemies.weakness: Slow turning speed, vulnerable during pattern transitions
enemies.visual_description: Orange square with rotating inner core, leaves web-like trail patterns

enemies.name: Red Pinwheel
enemies.attack_pattern: Spawns in groups, slowly drifts toward player while spinning
enemies.weakness: Very slow movement, easy to avoid but lethal in clusters
enemies.visual_description: Red circular enemy with rotating pinwheel blades, emanates red particles

enemies.name: Yellow Grunt
enemies.attack_pattern: Moves in straight lines until hitting wall, then changes direction randomly
enemies.weakness: Completely predictable once direction locked
enemies.visual_description: Small yellow cube with sharp corners, basic geometric form

enemies.name: Purple Repulsor
enemies.attack_pattern: Remains stationary until player approaches, then releases shockwave and teleports
enemies.weakness: Vulnerable during teleport cooldown period
enemies.visual_description: Purple sphere with pulsing energy rings, distorts space around it

enemies.name: Cyan Spawner
enemies.attack_pattern: Stays in place, periodically spawns small cyan orbs that track player
enemies.weakness: Immobile, priority target to stop enemy multiplication
enemies.visual_description: Large cyan hexagon with rotating satellite orbs, pulses when spawning

enemies.name: White Evader
enemies.attack_pattern: Flees directly away from player when approached, attempts to lead into other enemies
enemies.weakness: Predictable escape vector, trap against walls
enemies.visual_description: White elongated triangle pointing away from player, jittery movement

enemies.name: Magenta Exploder
enemies.attack_pattern: Charges toward player in straight line, explodes into bullet spread on death
enemies.weakness: Destroy from distance to avoid explosion radius
enemies.visual_description: Magenta star shape with unstable pulsing core, grows brighter before charge

enemies.name: Teal Swarmer
enemies.attack_pattern: Spawns in massive groups, individually weak but overwhelming in numbers
enemies.weakness: Low health, bomb clears entire swarms effectively
enemies.visual_description: Tiny teal dots with faint glow, moves in coordinated swarm patterns

enemies.name: Gold Carrier
enemies.attack_pattern: Slowly drifts across arena, releases smaller enemies when damaged
enemies.weakness: High multiplier reward, focus fire to maximize score
enemies.visual_description: Large golden dodecahedron with cargo pods attached, majestic slow rotation

enemies.name: Black Hole
enemies.attack_pattern: Pulls player and enemies toward center with gravity field, crushes on contact
enemies.weakness: Slow movement, can be orbited if maintaining speed
enemies.visual_description: Swirling black vortex with purple event horizon, distorts grid underneath

enemies.name: Silver Splitter
enemies.attack_pattern: Splits into two smaller enemies when destroyed, each split inherits movement
enemies.weakness: Creates more targets, prioritize other enemies first
enemies.visual_description: Silver octagon with visible seam down middle, wobbles when near death

enemies.name: Crimson Bomber
enemies.attack_pattern: Fires explosive projectiles in arc toward player position
enemies.weakness: Slow fire rate, dodge projectiles and close distance
enemies.visual_description: Dark red triangle with cannon protrusion, recoils when firing

enemies.name: Lime Zigzagger
enemies.attack_pattern: Moves in sharp zigzag pattern across screen, unpredictable direction changes
enemies.weakness: Pattern repeats every 5 seconds, time shots accordingly
enemies.visual_description: Lime green chevron shape with motion blur trails, erratic energy

enemies.name: Amber Pulsator
enemies.attack_pattern: Emits concentric ring waves that damage on contact, pulses every 3 seconds
enemies.weakness: Vulnerable between pulse cycles, rush in after wave passes
enemies.visual_description: Amber circle with rhythmic expansion/contraction, hypnotic glow

enemies.name: Violet Teleporter
enemies.attack_pattern: Blinks in and out of existence, appears near player unpredictably
enemies.weakness: Brief vulnerability window when materializing
enemies.visual_description: Violet phantom shape with flickering opacity, leaves afterimage trails

enemies.name: Indigo Orbiter
enemies.attack_pattern: Orbits around central point in circular path, maintains fixed radius
enemies.weakness: Completely predictable orbit, easy interception
enemies.visual_description: Indigo crescent moon shape, smooth circular motion with trail

enemies.name: Scarlet Berserker
enemies.attack_pattern: Locks onto player, charges at high speed in straight line, briefly stuns on impact
enemies.weakness: Long cooldown after charge, dodge and counterattack
enemies.visual_description: Aggressive scarlet spike cluster, glows intensely before charge, exhaust trail

bosses.name: The Convergence Gate

attacks: Spawns waves of Pink Darts from four directional gates
Gates rotate slowly around arena perimeter
Occasional Purple Repulsor spawns near player
tells: Gates glow brighter before spawn wave
Rotation speed increases as phase progresses
Screen edges pulse with spawning rhythm
phases.weakness: Destroy gates to reduce spawn rate, prioritize gate closest to highest density

attacks: Gates begin firing bullet streams toward center
Spawns Green Snakes that patrol gate connections
Arena grid warps and twists, affecting movement
tells: Gates lock position and angle toward center
Red targeting lasers appear before bullet streams
Grid distortion intensifies near active gates
phases.weakness: Snakes are invulnerable until all gates destroyed, focus gates first

attacks: All remaining gates converge to center, forming mega-gate
Rapid-fire spawn of mixed enemy types in all directions
Mega-gate emits expanding shockwave rings every 5 seconds
tells: Gates pulse synchronously before convergence
Center screen glows with increasing intensity
Audio cue (deep bass pulse) before shockwave
phases.weakness: Mega-gate core exposed between shockwaves, bombs highly effective

bosses.arena: Standard rectangular arena with glowing grid, four corners marked by spawn gates
bosses.visual_description: Four massive triangular gates at cardinal directions, neon blue energy frames, connected by pulsing light beams, mega-gate forms as swirling vortex of all gate colors

bosses.name: Serpent King Ouroboros

attacks: Giant Green Snake with 20 segments circles arena slowly
Tail chases head in continuous loop
Contact with any segment deals damage
tells: Head glows brighter when about to accelerate
Segments pulse in wave pattern before direction change
Arena perimeter glows indicating safe zones
phases.weakness: Shoot head continuously, avoid body segments by staying in center

attacks: Ouroboros splits into three smaller snakes
Each snake moves independently with aggressive AI
Periodically reconnect into larger formations
tells: Splitting point marked by bright flash at segment
Snakes flash yellow when about to reconnect
Reconnection pulls all three toward merge point
phases.weakness: Target weakest snake first to prevent reconnection, bombs break formations

attacks: Reforms into single massive snake filling most of arena
Spawns Teal Swarmers from body segments continuously
Creates spiral pattern forcing player to constant movement
tells: All segments glow in sequence before spawning swarmers
Spiral tightens gradually, reducing safe space
Head charges briefly before each spiral loop
phases.weakness: Focus fire on head only, ignore body and swarmers, prioritize survival

bosses.arena: Circular arena with grid warping in spiral pattern, shrinks slightly in final phase
bosses.visual_description: Enormous segmented serpent with emerald scales, each segment larger than standard snake, head features glowing eyes and fanged appearance, segments connected by elastic energy bands

bosses.name: Nexus Swarm Intelligence

attacks: Hundreds of Teal Swarmers move in organized geometric patterns
Patterns shift between grid, spiral, and wave formations
Individual swarmers occasionally break formation to chase player
tells: Formation shift announced by brief freeze and color pulse
Breaking swarmers flash white before detaching
Pattern edges glow to show next formation shape
phases.weakness: Bombs clear large sections, maintain multiplier by sustained fire into formations

attacks: Swarm forms into giant enemy shapes (mimics other enemies)
Each mimic uses attack patterns of copied enemy type
Destroying mimic releases component swarmers
tells: Swarm coalesces with enemy silhouette preview
Mimic glows at weak point (usually center mass)
Released swarmers briefly disoriented before reforming
phases.weakness: Target mimic weak points before full formation, AOE weapons highly effective

attacks: Entire swarm forms sentient mega-entity with humanoid shape
Mega-entity fires massive beam from hands
Summons Silver Splitters as support units
Creates safe zones that collapse unexpectedly
tells: Mega-entity raises hand before beam attack, 2-second charge
Beam tracking path shown as faint line before firing
Safe zones pulse faster as collapse approaches
Splitter spawn points marked by grid distortion
phases.weakness: Core located in chest region, exposed after beam attacks during cooldown

bosses.arena: Large square arena with dynamic grid that responds to swarm density, brighter where swarm is thickest
bosses.visual_description: Massive coordinated swarm of thousands of tiny teal dots, forms distinct shapes and silhouettes, mega-entity phase shows towering humanoid figure made entirely of swarming particles with glowing core

bosses.name: Singularity Engine

attacks: Single large Black Hole at arena center with strong gravity pull
Periodically spawns Purple Repulsors at random positions
Gravity strength pulses rhythmically, creating push-pull effect
tells: Black hole expansion indicates pull strength increase
Repulsor spawn locations telegraph with purple circles 1 second early
Gravity pulse rhythm shown by concentric ring animations
phases.weakness: Circle at mid-range to maintain position, shoot continuously at core

attacks: Black hole splits into three smaller singularities in triangle formation
Each singularity orbits while maintaining gravity field
Spawns White Evaders that flee between singularities
Gravity fields overlap creating turbulent zones
tells: Singularities glow before changing orbit direction
Turbulent zones visible as distorted grid regions
Evaders spawn from singularity surfaces with flash
phases.weakness: Target one singularity at a time, use gravity to slingshot between them

attacks: All singularities merge into unstable super-massive black hole
Extreme gravity pull toward center, nearly inescapable
Fires radial bullet spreads outward while pulling inward simultaneously
Spawns all enemy types from event horizon
Creates temporary white holes that push player toward black hole
tells: Screen-wide red flash before bullet spread
White holes appear with blinding white flash at spawn
Enemy spawn types previewed at horizon before emergence
Core destabilizes with increasing frequency as health drops
phases.weakness: Core fully exposed but requires maximum thrust to maintain safe orbit, bombs negate gravity briefly

bosses.arena: Octagonal arena with grid heavily distorted by gravitational lensing, walls can be used to slingshot momentum
bosses.visual_description: Massive swirling black void with purple and blue accretion disk, space-time visibly warped around it, event horizon crackles with energy, surrounded by debris and particle streams being pulled inward, final phase features unstable core with lightning-like energy arcs

game_modes.name: Deadline
game_modes.unique_mechanic: 3-minute timed sessions, score multiplier based on geom collection speed
game_modes.color_palette: Neon grid on black void, vibrant particle trails

game_modes.name: King
game_modes.unique_mechanic: Protect a stationary king piece, lose if it's destroyed
game_modes.color_palette: Royal blue and gold accents on grid

game_modes.name: Evolved
game_modes.unique_mechanic: Lives system, progressively harder enemy waves, gate-based spawning
game_modes.environment: Bounded rectangle with gates on edges
primary_enemies: All enemy types in escalating combinations

game_modes.name: Pacifism
game_modes.unique_mechanic: Cannot fire weapons, destroy enemies by passing through gates
game_modes.environment: Arena with horizontal and vertical safe-zone gates

game_modes.name: Waves
game_modes.unique_mechanic: 60 distinct numbered waves, clear all enemies to advance

game_modes.name: Sequence
game_modes.unique_mechanic: Progress through 20 stages, each 30 seconds, one life total

level_design.difficulty_ramp: No traditional level progression. Each game mode has internal difficulty scaling: enemy density increases, spawn rates accelerate, and enemy types combine in deadlier formations as time/score/wave count increases. Mastery comes from perfecting each mode independently.

progression.currency: Geoms (green multiplier pickups dropped by enemies)
progression.multiplier_system: Core progression mechanic: collect geoms rapidly to build score multiplier (up to 150x in some modes). Multiplier decays if not collected quickly. Death resets multiplier.
progression.unlockables: Game modes unlock sequentially by achieving score thresholds or medal ranks in previous modes
power_ups: Extra lives (rare drops in certain modes)
progression.achievement_driven: Xbox Live achievements and leaderboards drive replayability. Medals (Bronze/Silver/Gold) awarded per mode based on score thresholds.

items.name: Geom (Green)
items.effect: Increases score multiplier by 1x when collected, decays over time if not collected

items.name: Geom (Orange)
items.effect: Higher value geom, spawns from tougher enemies or chains

items.name: Smart Bomb
items.effect: Clears all enemies on screen, converts them to geoms
items.visual: Expanding shockwave ring with particle burst

items.name: Black Hole
items.effect: Enemy spawned obstacle that sucks in nearby entities and warps geometry grid

items.name: Gate (Pacifism mode)
items.effect: Passing through destroys nearby enemies, temporary invincibility
items.visual: Glowing rectangular frame, collapses after use

items.name: King Piece
items.effect: Stationary ally in King mode, must be defended

items.name: Enemy Spawner
items.effect: Spawns waves of smaller enemies until destroyed
items.visual: Pulsing diamond that births smaller shapes

items.name: Snake Segment
items.effect: Chain enemy that fragments when shot, each piece dangerous

items.name: Repulsor
items.effect: Enemy that pushes player ship away, disrupts positioning

items.name: Weaver
items.effect: Enemy that moves in unpredictable sine-wave patterns

items.name: Gravity Well
items.effect: Pulls player and enemies toward center, alters movement physics
items.visual: Grid depression with radial particle pull

ui_ux.hud_layout: Minimal overlay: score (top left), multiplier (top right), lives/bombs (bottom left), timer (bottom right in timed modes). All text uses glowing vector font matching neon aesthetic.
ui_ux.menus: Sleek 3D rotating geometric menu system. Mode selection shows thumbnail preview + medal status + high score. Leaderboard integration prominent.
ui_ux.inventory: None (power-ups used instantly or on button press)
ui_ux.dialog_style: No story dialog. Pure arcade presentation.
ui_ux.feedback: Heavy particle effects for every action: enemy destruction erupts in geom showers, bombs create radial waves, death triggers screen-filling explosion. Grid surface warps dynamically with gravity and impacts. Audio-visual synesthesia: every shot, explosion, and collection has distinct sound + particle signature.
ui_ux.accessibility: Color-coded enemies with distinct shapes. High contrast neon-on-black. No accessibility assists (2008 arcade design philosophy).

difficulty_curve.early_game: First 30-60 seconds of any mode: sparse enemy spawns, slow movement, forgiving spacing. Player learns enemy patterns.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: 1-3 minutes: spawn gates open more frequently, multiple enemy types overlap, black holes and gravity wells appear, multiplier management becomes critical.
difficulty_curve.late_game: 3+ minutes / high waves: screen floods with enemies, safe space shrinks, requires perfect multiplier chains and bomb timing. Difficulty caps vary by mode (Deadline at 3min, Evolved endless, Sequence has fixed 20-stage cap).
difficulty_curve.skill_expression: Mastery comes from movement precision (twin-stick control), geom route optimization, bomb timing, and risk/reward decisions (chase high multipliers vs. survive).

replayability.leaderboards: Global Xbox Live leaderboards per mode drive competitive replay. Friend score comparisons prominent.
replayability.medals: Bronze/Silver/Gold thresholds per mode unlock bragging rights and subsequent modes.
replayability.achievements: Xbox achievements for score milestones, mode-specific feats (e.g., Pacifism pacifist run, Sequence one-life clear).
replayability.score_chasing: Core loop: beat personal best, climb leaderboards, optimize multiplier chains.
replayability.mode_variety: 6 distinct game modes require different skills: time attack, defense, survival, pacifist, wave clear, gauntlet.
replayability.mastery_ceiling: Extremely high skill ceiling. Top players perfect geom routes, memorize spawn timings, execute frame-perfect maneuvers.
replayability.no_content_unlocks: No cosmetic skins, ship upgrades, or story content. Replayability purely intrinsic: perfecting scores and leaderboard rank.
